research_method: Firecrawl-driven (map 4 competitors → diff against 85 slugs → search top SERP per finalist → scrape top 5 for blueprint depth)

secondary_keywords: best canvas size to sell on etsy
items.intent: transactional + informational (Etsy seller preparing canvas POD listings; secondary: buyer comparing sizes)
items.search_competition: shallow — top SERP is YouTube + qprints + Etsy market page + Reddit. Gelato canvas-sizes blog is closest direct competitor.
items.differentiation_vs_existing_pages: We have Canva (the design tool) pages — this is canvas (the print substrate). Distinct topic, distinct slug. No cannibalization.

faq.q: What canvas size sells best on Etsy?
faq.a_outline: 16×20 and 12×18 dominate mid-priced canvas POD; 24×36 wins on AOV. Reference buyer search patterns.
Yes — most POD providers wrap 0.75″–1.5″. Recommend 1″ bleed safety margin in master.

faq.q: What DPI should canvas prints be?
faq.a_outline: 300 DPI at the final canvas size. 240 DPI acceptable above 24×36 for POD.

faq.q: Can I use the same file for paper and canvas?
faq.a_outline: If aspect ratio matches AND you've added bleed, yes. SnapToSize exports both with one upload.
RGB sRGB. POD canvas printers convert internally. Cross-link to /cmyk-vs-rgb-for-etsy-printables.

items.snap_angle: POD canvas sellers need a master that works across canvas + paper + framed. Snap = one upload, all ratios + sizes in 1 ZIP. CTA after H2#3 (ratios) and after H2#8 (Snap angle).

secondary_keywords: rgb or cmyk for digital downloads
items.intent: problem-solver (seller confused about color mode — high frustration query)
items.search_competition: weak — Reddit + Facebook in top 2; only Gold City Ventures (7 H2) and Printify (15 H2) are structured competitors. Direct gap.
items.differentiation_vs_existing_pages: No existing page covers color mode. Pairs with bleed/crop, blurry-prints, file-format pages.

CMYK vs RGB for Etsy printables — FAQ
verification_steps: Photoshop: Image → Mode → check RGB Color is selected
Canva: Download → File type PNG/JPG (Canva exports RGB by default)
Illustrator: File → Document Color Mode → RGB Color
Affinity Photo: Document → Convert Format / Color Profile → sRGB
Preview a JPG: macOS Preview → Tools → Inspector → ICC profile reads sRGB
color_problem_table: Screen brighter than paper; soft-proof recommended
POD provider auto-converts to CMYK; nothing to fix
Wrong color profile (Adobe RGB instead of sRGB)
Home printer ink mix; not the file's fault

faq.q: Should Etsy printables be CMYK or RGB?
faq.a_outline: RGB (sRGB). Buyers print on home printers, which expect RGB. CMYK conversion is the printer driver's job.

faq.q: What color profile is best for digital downloads?
faq.a_outline: sRGB IEC61966-2.1. Universal default; every printer/screen handles it.

faq.q: Will CMYK print better at home?
faq.a_outline: No. Home printers receive RGB and convert internally. CMYK files often print muddier.

faq.q: Why does my print look different from the screen?
faq.a_outline: Monitors emit light, paper reflects it. Soft-proof in Photoshop or accept ~10% shift as normal.
The standard RGB color space for screens, web, and consumer printers.

faq.q: How do I check my file's color mode?
faq.a_outline: Photoshop → Image → Mode. Cross-reference verification steps section.

faq.q: Does Etsy convert my file's color profile?
faq.a_outline: No. Etsy delivers the file you upload, untouched.

items.snap_angle: Snap exports sRGB-tagged JPG/PNG by default — no color mode juggling for sellers. CTA after verification H2 + after Snap-angle H2.

shared_quality_gates.design_template: Match etsy-printable-bleed-and-crop-marks (problem-solver) for cmyk; etsy-square-print-sizes (size-format) for canvas
